Meaning.En: The angular distance of a place north or south of the Earth’s equator, measured in degrees.
Meaning.Example: Hanoi is located at approximately 21 degrees north latitude.

Situation.Vi: Vị trí địa lý tính từ xích đạo về phía bắc hoặc nam.
Situation.En: Position on Earth measured as degrees north or south of the equator.

Meaning.Vi: Sự tự do hành động; mức độ linh hoạt
Meaning.En: The degree of freedom or scope for action or thought; flexibility or leeway.
Meaning.Example: The manager gave the team some latitude in how they structured their project.

Situation.Vi: Cho phép người khác tự do quyết định trong một phạm vi nhất định.
Situation.En: Allowing someone freedom to make decisions within a certain range.
